headline: Initial packaged release (1.0.0)
notes: Shipped the unified NiceGUI workspace for RSU, OBU, SCMS, TIM, and UTA tooling.
Added versioned Windows packaging so field builds can be tracked by release number.
Introduced in-app release history and update-check plumbing for future executable rollouts.
